features.name: nonblocking_assignment_in_combinational_always_block
features.description: Code should include a combinational always @(*) block with non-blocking assignments (<=) to registers used to compute next-state values

features.name: combinational_xor_tree_with_30plus_inputs
features.description: Code should include wide XOR expressions with 30+ input terms computed in a combinational block
features.snippet: next[0] <= crc_reg[0] ^ crc_reg[24] ^ data1[7] ^ crc_reg[29] ^ data1[2] ^ crc_reg[28] ^ data1[3] ^ crc_reg[10] ^ crc_reg[26] ^ data1[5] ^ data1[21] ^ crc_reg[9] ^ crc_reg[25] ^ data1[6] ^ data1[22] ^ crc_reg[6] ^ crc_reg[30] ^ data1[1] ^ crc_reg[16] ^ data1[15] ^ crc_reg[31] ^ data1[0] ^ crc_reg[12] ^ data1[19] ^ data1[25] ^ data1[31];

features.name: intermediate_combinational_register_chain
features.description: Code should include a two-stage register pipeline where combinational logic computes intermediate values (next) that feed into a clocked register (reg) in a subsequent always block

features.name: conditional_partial_word_assignment
features.description: Code should include conditional assignments to registers based on bit-selects of a control signal, where different width slices are assigned based on bit position
